subject: we have got a call
body:
Hey Justin, Liam here.

I will be direct.

January usually splits people into two groups.

There are those who use it to make decisions, set direction, and actually start moving toward something new.

And there are those who stay in I will do it tomorrow mode - consuming more content, waiting for the perfect moment, and telling themselves they will start later.

If you are in the second group, and building or scaling an AI business is not a priority for you right now, feel free to skip this email.

But if you are in the first group, my team has something for you.

We have just opened a limited number of spots for free discovery sessions heading into 2026.

This is not a sales pitch.

It is a focused conversation to understand your AI business goals for the year ahead and see whether we can help you either:

land your first AI clients, or
scale what you have already started.

If it is not a fit, we will tell you honestly.
If it is, we will help you map a clear path forward.

Looking forward to connecting,

Liam

PS: Not sure this could work for you?

Andres and Jana thought the same before joining Accelerator.

Five months later, they closed a 45k deal for their AI agency.

To be clear - they worked hard and started sprinting from day one. This takes effort.

But think about May 1st this year (five months from now).

What would it feel like to be closing deals like that - and actually changing the trajectory of your 2026?
